sc.political.s: FEC data 2020-2024: ~55% Democratic, ~45% Republican donations; no ≥70% threshold met.
sc.environment.s: No EPA enforcement actions or named pollution events on record; Scope 1+2 disclosed annually.
sc.animals.s: Not applicable; manufacturing company with no animal testing or product lines.
sc.guns.s: Raytheon Technologies manufactures missiles, radar systems, and defense electronics; subsidiary RTX Missiles & Fire Control produces air-to-air and air-to-ground munitions.
sc.privacy.s: Not applicable; B2B defense contractor with no consumer data collection.
sc.execPay.s: CEO-to-median-worker ratio not publicly disclosed in audited form; no verified data available.
